app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.37 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for  Server F,  Server G, stronger native buffering, larger temporary stream cache, and faster fallback choices above Server A.
releaseNotes: Improved TV Home layout with a framed hero and compact landscape rows
Added  Server F with native HLS playback above Server A when available
Added Server G for  links when a real embed ID is available
Moved Server F and Server G above Server A in Auto so users can avoid buffering Server A links when better streams resolve
Raised native ahead-buffer targets so streams load farther ahead during playback
Raised the temporary stream cache limit to 2 GB and still clears it after player sessions
Shortened stream resolver cache so expired or weak links refresh sooner
Removed the WebView player route and dead embed server path
Increased temporary playback cache and buffer targets for smoother streaming
Added extra browser headers for MultiXS native stream links
Fixed Kids and new profiles leaking the signed-in donor email
Added a manual Check for updates button in Settings
Fixed force update handling when latestVersionCode is newer
Changed report issue link to the official issue report center
Improved TV Anime poster focus routing and filtered invalid Anime IDs
Improved Anime episode rows with visible TV focus
Fixed TV Search query resets and reduced oversized TV search cards
Preserved donor entitlement across restart while clearing it on explicit sign-out
Added optional manual export for completed phone downloads
Improved TV player focus so red only marks the focused control
Disabled non-essential ad/support launch notifications
Fixed WebView player close/back handling so users can exit stuck embeds
Forced embedded servers into the landscape player route instead of portrait loading
Stopped WebView servers from being sent through ExoPlayer
Moved Gacheri ahead of slower native server groups
Cleaned synced Anime Continue Watching rows so duplicate junk metadata is filtered
Removed the old HLS provider from the normal stream resolver
Loaded WebView servers directly with referer headers instead of iframe wrapping
Restored phones to portrait after leaving any player
Fixed cached subtitle file playback through FileProvider
Automatically skips dead native servers on HTTP 403, 404, or 410
Added CineFreak direct movie and episode streams
Added MultiXS movie and episode streams with referer headers
Kept playback on native scraper links before any WebView path
Fixed CineFreak and MultiXS stream type priority when URLs do not expose a file extension
Trusted both configured and currently installed signing certificates during update verification

items.title: The Cube 2.0.37
items.message: Vidfast Server F and Vidking Server G were added, Auto now tries them above Server A when playable, and native buffering/cache were strengthened.

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
